items.title: [Charania] Restricted free agent Quinten Post is signing a three-year, $30 million contract offer sheet with the Memphis Grizzlies, sources tell ESPN. The Golden State Warriors have until 11:59pm ET on Tuesday to match.
items.author: urfaselol
items.body_excerpt: Restricted free agent Quinten Post is signing a three-year, $30 million contract offer sheet with the Memphis Grizzlies, sources tell ESPN. The Golden State Warriors have until 11:59pm ET on Tuesday to match. https://www.espn.com/contributor/shams-charania/b7af9699ede06

items.title: Quinten Post's offer sheet will come out of the Non-Taxpayer MLE for the Grizzlies, if the Warriors don't match.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Quinten Post's offer sheet will come out of the Non-Taxpayer MLE for the Grizzlies, if the Warriors don't match.

That means that Memphis will likely tie the Isaiah Stewart acquisition into the Santi Aldama trade. Expect that one to ultimately be a four- or five-team deal.

items.title: The Golden State Warriors have tendered a qualifying offer to Quinten Post and two-way qualifying offers to Taran Armstrong and Nico Mannion, a league source told @spotrac.com.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
The Golden State Warriors have tendered a qualifying offer to Quinten Post and two-way qualifying offers to Taran Armstrong and Nico Mannion, a league source told @spotrac.com. 

All three players will now be restricted free agents this offseason.
